title: tribulus micrococcus
intro: Tribulus micrococcus, also known as Tribulus, is a plant-based ingredient that belongs to the Zygophyllaceae family and is commonly found in various parts of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. Tribulus has been associated with several health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, enhancing athletic performance, and supporting prostate health. Tribulus is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make teas and infusions.
